properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise Him, you heavens and all that's above Praise Him, you angels and heavenly hosts Let the whole earth praise Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise Him, the sun, moon and bright shining stars Praise Him, you heavens and waters and skies Let the whole earth praise Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Great in power, great in glory Great in mercy, King of Heaven Great in battle, great in wonder Great in Zion, King over all the earth.
